      "EnqueueTaskRequest": {
        "properties": {
          "content": {
            "description": "Opaque payload forwarded verbatim to the launcher.",

          },
          "conversation_mode": {
            "default": "new",
            "description": "``new`` (default) starts a fresh agent conversation. ``resume`` passes ``--resume``/``--session`` to the launcher using the session's last captured conversation id; falls back to ``new`` and emits ``agent.conversation_resume_skipped`` when no id is stored yet.",
            "enum": [

            "title": "Conversation Mode",
            "type": "string"

            "anyOf": [

                "type": "string"

              {
                "type": "null"

            ],
            "description": "Optional reasoning-effort for this task. Overrides the session and deployment effort defaults when set. ``null`` (default) inherits from the session or deployment default.             "title": "Effort"

            "title": "Model"
          },
          "scheduled_for": {
            "default": "now",
            "description": "Scheduling hint. ``now`` (default) preserves the immediate-dispatch behaviour. Other values (``next_window``, ISO 8601 timestamps) are accepted but not interpreted in v1 \u2014 recorded on the event verbatim.",
            "title": "Scheduled For",
            "type": "string"
          }
        },

        "title": "EnqueueTaskRequest",

          }
        },
        "required": [
          "attempt",
          "retry_after_s",
          "reason"
        ],
        "title": "RetryInfoResponse",
        "type": "object"
      },
      "ScheduleReason": {
        "description": "Why a queued task is not in ``ready`` right now.",
        "properties": {
          "kind": {
            "enum": [
              "window",
              "manual"
            ],
            "title": "Kind",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "scheduled_for": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "format": "date-time",
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "description": "Next work_window opening (UTC) for kind='window'; null for kind='manual' or when no window opens within the lookahead horizon.",
            "title": "Scheduled For"
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "kind"
        ],
        "title": "ScheduleReason",
        "type": "object"
      },
      "ScheduledTaskEntry": {
        "properties": {
          "content": {
            "title": "Content",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "created_at": {
            "format": "date-time",
            "title": "Created At",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "priority": {
            "title": "Priority",
            "type": "integer"
          },
          "reason": {
            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/ScheduleReason"
          },
          "scheduled_for": {
            "description": "The verbatim scheduling hint recorded at enqueue time (v1).",
            "title": "Scheduled For",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "session_id": {
            "title": "Session Id",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "task_id": {
            "format": "uuid",
            "title": "Task Id",
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "task_id",
          "session_id",
          "content",
          "scheduled_for",
          "created_at",
          "priority",
          "reason"
        ],
        "title": "ScheduledTaskEntry",
        "type": "object"
      },
      "SendMessageRequest": {
        "properties": {
          "content": {
            "title": "Content",
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "content"
        ],
        "title": "SendMessageRequest",
        "type": "object"
      },
      "SessionDetailResponse": {
        "properties": {
          "created_at": {
            "format": "date-time",
            "title": "Created At",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "events": {
            "items": {
              "additionalProperties": true,
              "type": "object"
            },
            "title": "Events",
            "type": "array"
          },
          "last_conversation_id": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Last Conversation Id"
          },
          "priority": {
            "title": "Priority",
            "type": "integer"
          },
          "session_id": {
            "title": "Session Id",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "status": {
            "title": "Status",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "updated_at": {
            "format": "date-time",
            "title": "Updated At",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "workspace": {
            "title": "Workspace",
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "session_id",
          "status",
          "workspace",
          "events",
          "priority",
          "created_at",
          "updated_at"
        ],
        "title": "SessionDetailResponse",
        "type": "object"
      },
      "SessionPriorityResponse": {
        "properties": {
          "priority": {
            "title": "Priority",
            "type": "integer"
          },
          "session_id": {
            "title": "Session Id",
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "session_id",
          "priority"
        ],
        "title": "SessionPriorityResponse",
        "type": "object"
      },
      "SessionSummaryResponse": {
        "properties": {
          "created_at": {
            "format": "date-time",
            "title": "Created At",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "priority": {
            "title": "Priority",
            "type": "integer"
          },
          "session_id": {
            "title": "Session Id",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "status": {
            "title": "Status",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "updated_at": {
            "format": "date-time",
            "title": "Updated At",
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "session_id",
          "status",
          "priority",
          "created_at",
          "updated_at"
        ],
        "title": "SessionSummaryResponse",
        "type": "object"
      },
      "SetDeploymentEffortRequest": {
        "properties": {
          "effort": {
            "description": "Reasoning-effort level to set as the deployment-wide default. Opaque pass-through string forwarded verbatim to the provider CLI (claude ``--effort``, opencode ``--variant``); not validated by Mad.",
            "title": "Effort",
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "effort"
        ],
        "title": "SetDeploymentEffortRequest",
        "type": "object"
      },
      "SetDeploymentModelRequest": {
        "properties": {
          "model": {
            "description": "Model identifier to set as the deployment-wide default.",
            "title": "Model",
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "model"
        ],
        "title": "SetDeploymentModelRequest",
        "type": "object"
      },
      "TaskResponse": {
        "properties": {
          "content": {
            "title": "Content",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "conversation_mode": {
            "default": "new",
            "enum": [
              "new",
              "resume"
            ],
            "title": "Conversation Mode",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "created_at": {
            "format": "date-time",
            "title": "Created At",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "effort": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Effort"
          },
          "model": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Model"
          },
          "retry_info": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "$ref": "#/components/schemas/RetryInfoResponse"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "description": "Present only when ``status == 'retrying'``."
          },
          "scheduled_for": {
            "title": "Scheduled For",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "session_id": {
            "title": "Session Id",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "status": {
            "default": "dispatched",
            "description": "``dispatched`` \u2014 the task is running normally. ``retrying`` \u2014 the task hit a rate limit and is sleeping before the next attempt; see ``retry_info`` for details.",
            "enum": [
              "dispatched",
              "retrying"
            ],
            "title": "Status",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "task_id": {
            "format": "uuid",
            "title": "Task Id",
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "task_id",
          "session_id",
          "content",
          "scheduled_for",
          "created_at"
        ],
        "title": "TaskResponse",
        "type": "object"
      },
      "TriggerManualDispatchResponse": {
        "properties": {
          "drained": {
            "description": "Number of currently-queued tasks the trigger covers.",
            "title": "Drained",
            "type": "integer"
          },
          "session_id": {
            "title": "Session Id",
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "session_id",
          "drained"
        ],
        "title": "TriggerManualDispatchResponse",
        "type": "object"
      },
      "UpdatePriorityRequest": {
        "properties": {
          "priority": {
            "description": "Cross-session dispatch priority. Higher dispatches first; [1, 10]. Out-of-range values are rejected, never clamped.",
            "maximum": 10.0,
            "minimum": 1.0,
            "title": "Priority",
            "type": "integer"
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "priority"
        ],
        "title": "UpdatePriorityRequest",
        "type": "object"
      },
      "ValidationError": {
        "properties": {
          "ctx": {
            "title": "Context",
            "type": "object"
          },
          "input": {
            "title": "Input"
          },
          "loc": {
            "items": {
              "anyOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "integer"
                }
              ]
            },
            "title": "Location",
            "type": "array"
          },
          "msg": {
            "title": "Message",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "type": {
            "title": "Error Type",
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "loc",
          "msg",
          "type"
        ],
        "title": "ValidationError",
        "type": "object"
      },
      "WindowSpec": {
        "description": "One time window inside a ``work_window`` policy.\n\n``start`` / ``end`` are HH:MM 24h literals. Windows can wrap midnight\n(``end <= start``). ``timezone`` is an IANA name so DST is honored.\n``days`` is optional; defaults to all days.",
        "properties": {
          "days": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "items": {
                  "enum": [
                    "mon",
                    "tue",
                    "wed",
                    "thu",
                    "fri",
                    "sat",
                    "sun"
                  ],
                  "type": "string"
                },
                "type": "array"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "description": "Optional weekday filter; defaults to every day.",
            "title": "Days"
          },
          "end": {
            "description": "HH:MM 24h, e.g. '08:00'. Wraps midnight if <= start.",
            "title": "End",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "start": {
            "description": "HH:MM 24h, e.g. '18:00'.",
            "title": "Start",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "timezone": {
            "description": "IANA timezone, e.g. 'America/Mexico_City'.",
            "title": "Timezone",
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "start",
          "end",
          "timezone"
        ],
        "title": "WindowSpec",
        "type": "object"
      },
      "WorkWindowPolicyRequest": {
        "properties": {
          "kind": {
            "const": "work_window",
            "title": "Kind",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "windows": {
            "items": {
              "$ref": "#/components/schemas/WindowSpec"
            },
            "minItems": 1,
            "title": "Windows",
            "type": "array"
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "kind",
          "windows"
        ],
        "title": "WorkWindowPolicyRequest",
        "type": "object"
      },
      "WorkflowMountRequest": {
        "properties": {
          "content": {
            "default": "",
            "description": "Inline content for a 'file' mount.",
            "title": "Content",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "from_step": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "description": "Inherit this github mount's repo URL from a predecessor step and check out what it produced. Must be listed in the step's depends_on and reference a step that has a github mount, else 422.",
            "title": "From Step"
          },
          "mount_path": {
            "description": "Where the resource mounts in the workspace.",
            "title": "Mount Path",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "ref": {
            "default": "sha",
            "description": "For a from_step mount: 'sha' (default) pins the predecessor's immutable head_sha; 'branch' tracks its branch tip.",
            "enum": [
              "sha",
              "branch"
            ],
            "title": "Ref",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "type": {
            "default": "github_repository",
            "enum": [
              "github_repository",
              "file"
            ],
            "title": "Type",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "url": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "description": "Explicit github repo URL. Mutually exclusive with from_step.",
            "title": "Url"
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "mount_path"
        ],
        "title": "WorkflowMountRequest",
        "type": "object"
      },
      "WorkflowStatusResponse": {
        "properties": {
          "status": {
            "enum": [
              "pending",
              "running",
              "completed",
              "failed"
            ],
            "title": "Status",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "steps": {
            "items": {
              "$ref": "#/components/schemas/WorkflowStepStatusResponse"
            },
            "title": "Steps",
            "type": "array"
          },
          "workflow_id": {
            "title": "Workflow Id",
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "workflow_id",
          "status",
          "steps"
        ],
        "title": "WorkflowStatusResponse",
        "type": "object"
      },
      "WorkflowStepRequest": {
        "properties": {
          "depends_on": {
            "description": "Zero or more predecessor step ids. The step's task is not enqueued until all of them emit task.completed. An ordering barrier on its own \u2014 independent of from_step.",
            "items": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "title": "Depends On",
            "type": "array"
          },
          "id": {
            "description": "Unique step id, referenced by depends_on / from_step.",
            "title": "Id",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "session": {
            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/WorkflowStepSession"
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "id",
          "session"
        ],
        "title": "WorkflowStepRequest",
        "type": "object"
      },
      "WorkflowStepSession": {
        "description": "A step's session configuration: the agent, the task prompt, and mounts.",
        "properties": {
          "agent": {
            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/AgentSpec"
          },
          "base_branch": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Base Branch"
          },
          "effort": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Effort"
          },
          "model": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Model"
          },
          "mounts": {
            "items": {
              "$ref": "#/components/schemas/WorkflowMountRequest"
            },
            "title": "Mounts",
            "type": "array"
          },
          "prompt": {
            "description": "Opaque task content forwarded verbatim to the launcher.",
            "title": "Prompt",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "timeout_s": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "exclusiveMinimum": 0.0,
                "type": "number"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Timeout S"
          },
          "working_directory": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Working Directory"
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "agent",
          "prompt"
        ],
        "title": "WorkflowStepSession",
        "type": "object"
      },
      "WorkflowStepStatusResponse": {
        "properties": {
          "depends_on": {
            "items": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "title": "Depends On",
            "type": "array"
          },
          "reason": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "description": "Failure reason when status == 'failed'.",
            "title": "Reason"
          },
          "session_id": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Session Id"
          },
          "status": {
            "enum": [
              "pending",
              "running",
              "completed",
              "failed"
            ],
            "title": "Status",
            "type": "string"
          },
          "step_id": {
            "title": "Step Id",
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "required": [
          "step_id",
          "status"
        ],
        "title": "WorkflowStepStatusResponse",
        "type": "object"
      }
    }
  },
  "info": {
    "title": "Mad",
    "version": "0.3.0"
  },
  "openapi": "3.1.0",
  "paths": {
    "/v1/config": {
      "get": {
        "description": "Return the server's effective operational configuration (read-only).\n\nValues reflect the process environment at request time; credentials are\nreported as presence booleans only, never as values (hard rule 2).",
        "operationId": "get_config_v1_config_get",
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/ConfigResponse"
                }
              }
            },
            "description": "Successful Response"
          }
        },
        "summary": "Get Config",
        "tags": [
          "config"
        ]
      }
    },
    "/v1/dispatch_policy": {
      "get": {
        "description": "Read the deployment-wide default dispatch policy.\n\nReturns the configured singleton, or ``{\"kind\": \"immediate\"}`` when no\ndeployment policy has been set (the effective fallback every inheriting\nsession uses).",
        "operationId": "get_deployment_dispatch_policy_v1_dispatch_policy_get",
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/DeploymentDispatchPolicyResponse"
                }
              }
            },
            "description": "Successful Response"
          }
        },
        "summary": "Get Deployment Dispatch Policy",
        "tags": [
          "orchestration"
        ]
      },
      "put": {
        "description": "Set the deployment-wide default dispatch policy.\n\nReuses the same discriminated union as the per-session ``PATCH``\n(``immediate`` / ``work_window`` / ``manual``). Every inheriting session\nhonours the new default on the next dispatch evaluation (live\ninheritance \u2014 no restart, no per-session re-PATCH). Emits\n``dispatch_policy.default.updated`` so the singleton is rebuilt on\nrestart via JSONL replay (hard rule 6).",
        "operationId": "set_deployment_dispatch_policy_v1_dispatch_policy_put",
        "requestBody": {
          "content": {
            "application/json": {
              "schema": {
                "discriminator": {
                  "mapping": {
                    "immediate": "#/components/schemas/ImmediatePolicyRequest",
                    "manual": "#/components/schemas/ManualPolicyRequest",
                    "work_window": "#/components/schemas/WorkWindowPolicyRequest"
                  },
                  "propertyName": "kind"
                },
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/ImmediatePolicyRequest"
                  },
                  {
                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/WorkWindowPolicyRequest"
                  },
                  {
                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/ManualPolicyRequest"
                  }
                ],
                "title": "Payload"
              }
            }
          },
          "required": true
        },
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/DeploymentDispatchPolicyResponse"
                }
              }
            },
            "description": "Successful Response"
          },
          "422": {
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"
                }
              }
            },
            "description": "Validation Error"
          }
        },
        "summary": "Set Deployment Dispatch Policy",
        "tags": [
          "orchestration"
        ]
      }
    },
    "/v1/effort": {
      "delete": {
        "description": "Clear the deployment-wide reasoning-effort default.\n\nAfter clearing, sessions with no per-session override will use the\nprovider's own machine-configured default (i.e. no ``--effort`` /\n``--variant`` flag is passed). Idempotent: clearing when already unset is\na no-op success.",
        "operationId": "clear_deployment_effort_v1_effort_delete",
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/DeploymentEffortResponse"
                }
              }
            },
            "description": "Successful Response"
          }
        },
        "summary": "Clear Deployment Effort",
        "tags": [
          "providers"
        ]
      },
      "get": {
        "description": "Read the deployment-wide default reasoning effort.\n\nReturns ``null`` for ``effort`` when no default has been set \u2014 the provider\nuses its own machine-configured default in that case.",
        "operationId": "get_deployment_effort_v1_effort_get",
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/DeploymentEffortResponse"
                }
              }
            },
            "description": "Successful Response"
          }
        },
        "summary": "Get Deployment Effort",
        "tags": [
          "providers"
        ]
      },
      "put": {
        "description": "Set the deployment-wide default reasoning effort.\n\nEvery session that has no per-session ``effort`` override will use this\ndefault on the next launcher invocation (live inheritance \u2014 no restart\nrequired). Emits ``effort.default.updated`` so the setting survives a\nrestart via JSONL replay (hard rule 6). The value is opaque \u2014 Mad does\nnot validate it against any provider's effort levels.",
        "operationId": "set_deployment_effort_v1_effort_put",
        "requestBody": {
          "content": {
            "application/json": {
              "schema": {
                "$ref": "#/components/schemas/SetDeploymentEffortRequest"
              }
            }
          },
          "required": true
        },
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/DeploymentEffortResponse"
                }
              }
            },
            "description": "Successful Response"
          },
          "422": {
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"
                }
              }
            },
            "description": "Validation Error"
          }
        },
        "summary": "Set Deployment Effort",
        "tags": [
          "providers"
        ]
      }
    },
    "/v1/events": {
      "get": {
        "operationId": "list_events_v1_events_get",
        "parameters": [
          {
            "in": "query",
            "name": "session_id",
            "required": false,
            "schema": {
              "anyOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ],
              "title": "Session Id"
            }
          },
          {
            "in": "query",
            "name": "kind",
            "required": false,
            "schema": {
              "anyOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ],
              "title": "Kind"
            }
          },
          {
            "in": "query",
            "name": "agent",
            "required": false,
            "schema": {
              "anyOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ],
              "title": "Agent"
            }
          },
          {
            "in": "query",
            "name": "since",
            "required": false,
            "schema": {
              "anyOf": [
                {
                  "format": "date-time",
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ],
              "title": "Since"
            }
          },

    "/v1/model": {
      "delete": {
        "description": "Clear the deployment-wide model default.\n\nAfter clearing, sessions with no per-session override will use the\nprovider's own machine-configured default (i.e. no ``--model`` flag is\npassed). Idempotent: clearing when already unset is a no-op success.",
        "operationId": "clear_deployment_model_v1_model_delete",
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/DeploymentModelResponse"

            "description": "Successful Response"
          }
        },
        "summary": "Clear Deployment Model",
        "tags": [
          "providers"
        ]
      },
      "get": {
        "description": "Read the deployment-wide default model.\n\nReturns ``null`` for ``model`` when no default has been set \u2014 the provider\nuses its own machine-configured default in that case.",
        "operationId": "get_deployment_model_v1_model_get",
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/DeploymentModelResponse"
                }
              }
            },
            "description": "Successful Response"
          }
        },
        "summary": "Get Deployment Model",
        "tags": [
          "providers"
        ]
      },
      "put": {
        "description": "Set the deployment-wide default model.\n\nEvery session that has no per-session ``model`` override will use this\ndefault on the next launcher invocation (live inheritance \u2014 no restart\nrequired). Emits ``model.default.updated`` so the setting survives a\nrestart via JSONL replay (hard rule 6).",
        "operationId": "set_deployment_model_v1_model_put",
        "requestBody": {
          "content": {
            "application/json": {
              "schema": {
                "$ref": "#/components/schemas/SetDeploymentModelRequest"
              }
            }
          },
          "required": true
        },
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/DeploymentModelResponse"
                }
              }
            },
            "description": "Successful Response"
          },
          "422": {
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"
                }
              }
            },
            "description": "Validation Error"
          }
        },
        "summary": "Set Deployment Model",
        "tags": [
          "providers"
        ]
      }
    },

          "orchestration"
        ]
      }
    },

    "/v1/sessions/{session_id}/dispatch_policy": {
      "delete": {
        "description": "Clear a session's per-session override so it re-inherits the default.\n\nIdempotent: clearing a session that already inherits is a no-op success\n(200), not a 409. Emits ``dispatch_policy.cleared`` so the cleared state\nsurvives a restart via JSONL replay.",
        "operationId": "clear_dispatch_policy_v1_sessions__session_id__dispatch_policy_delete",
        "parameters": [
          {
            "in": "path",
            "name": "session_id",
            "required": true,
            "schema": {
              "title": "Session Id",
              "type": "string"
            }
          }
        ],
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/ClearDispatchPolicyResponse"
                }
              }
            },
            "description": "Successful Response"
          },
          "422": {
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"
                }
              }
            },
            "description": "Validation Error"
          }
        },
        "summary": "Clear Dispatch Policy",
        "tags": [
          "orchestration"
        ]
      },
      "patch": {
        "description": "Set the dispatch policy for a session.\n\nThe body is a discriminated union on ``kind``:\n- ``{\"kind\": \"immediate\"}`` (default \u2014 same as today)\n- ``{\"kind\": \"work_window\", \"windows\": [...]}`` (overnight runs etc.)\n- ``{\"kind\": \"manual\"}`` (queue accumulates; explicit trigger drains)\n\nEmits ``dispatch_policy.updated`` so the policy survives a process\nrestart via JSONL replay.",
        "operationId": "update_dispatch_policy_v1_sessions__session_id__dispatch_policy_patch",
        "parameters": [
          {
            "in": "path",
            "name": "session_id",
            "required": true,
            "schema": {
              "title": "Session Id",
              "type": "string"
            }
          }
        ],
        "requestBody": {
          "content": {
            "application/json": {
              "schema": {
                "discriminator": {
                  "mapping": {
                    "immediate": "#/components/schemas/ImmediatePolicyRequest",
                    "manual": "#/components/schemas/ManualPolicyRequest",
                    "work_window": "#/components/schemas/WorkWindowPolicyRequest"
                  },
                  "propertyName": "kind"
                },
                "oneOf": [
                  {
                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/ImmediatePolicyRequest"
                  },
                  {
                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/WorkWindowPolicyRequest"
                  },
                  {
                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/ManualPolicyRequest"
                  }
                ],
                "title": "Payload"
              }
            }
          },
          "required": true
        },
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/DispatchPolicyResponse"
                }
              }
            },
            "description": "Successful Response"
          },
          "422": {
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"
                }
              }
            },
            "description": "Validation Error"
          }
        },
        "summary": "Update Dispatch Policy",
        "tags": [
          "orchestration"
        ]
      }
    },
    "/v1/sessions/{session_id}/dispatch_policy/trigger": {
      "post": {
        "description": "Drain the current queue once. Manual mode only; 409 otherwise.",

          "orchestration"
        ]
      }
    },
